description: Organize your Zotero library by publication venue. You have a mixed library of research papers. Create a collection named 'Nature Papers' (case-sensitive) containing all papers published in the journal 'Nature'. Create a second collection named 'NeurIPS Papers' (case-sensitive) containing all papers published in 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems'.

nature_titles: Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids: A Structure for Deoxyribose Nucleic Acid
Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search
neurips_titles: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
